reviews.review_description:
hello. i have played your game alot in the past.
it was absolutely peak, i wish moon could come back the game was just fun ik it doesnt have alot but imma be honest this was the 2nd game i got. it was gtag then this. if the owners wanna contact me my discord is Therealhalt_ and also i am remaking pt so maybe out soon? Merry christmas yall! 
 
thanks for reading 
Halt

I see SOOO much potential for this and just want to support the game. I join every day to check on the population. Ive only seen 2 people so far. And one of them was a mod and he kicked me, like all the mod do. But i dont mind. I use want to see this game get bigger, and do great things. Good luck out there, and don’t forget to be your self.


			-Winterflash

Bro this game is actually really cool and you can mod the game with dll’s and now I can’t get kicked or someone else make me invisible and it’s over all a fun game I’m probably gonna make a video on it soon so stay tuned!

reviews.review_title: I like but I hate the owner
reviews.review_description: I was playing gorilla tag and I met the owner he said play the game with me so I did he said he would give me mods he said gotta answer some questions first so I did he had to kick hammer ready if I said one question mean or wrong I was acting very nice until he said oh no I dropped my controller. I think he did it on purpose. He did it two seconds after he said it

Honestly if this stops it will be a 5 star

What is happening:
The stupid moderators (not including TT) keep kicking me and my friends,one ip banned me on my alt and the rest just kick me if I join a server. About a hour ago a person with owner said “if you move I’m gonna ban you” AND HE DID and I didn’t even move, honestly this game is just toxic and unplayable.
bro bad mods and to many glitches
Mods and owner are extremely rude kicked me for no reason and the maps aren't good.

please give me moderator. I really want moderator and I never been moderating your game. Please give me moderator that would make my day a lot better.
Please give me moderator. I want to help the community.
